title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three foundational rules for building projects with Claude Code, derived from Y Combinator principles. He details a six-move framework for leading AI-augmented teams and introduces a four-question test to validate projects before starting.
